seoTitle: How to Create a Landing Page in a Power BI Dashboard
metaDescription: Design a clean home landing page for your Power BI dashboard with borderless backgrounds, navigation buttons, and a centralized executive gateway.
intro: Overwhelming stakeholders with dense data tables the moment they open a dashboard makes for a poor first impression. A dedicated landing page gives users a clean, centralized gateway with navigation buttons pointing to deeper report pages. This guide covers designing that entry point inside Power BI Desktop.

steps.heading: Apply a borderless background
steps.body: Set up a modern canvas background using custom colors, transparency sliders, or an imported brand layout image to create a clean visual foundation.

steps.heading: Build navigation shapes
steps.body: Add clickable shapes or buttons styled as navigation elements pointing to your other report pages.

steps.heading: Map button destinations
steps.body: Configure each navigation button's action to jump to the correct destination page within your report.

steps.heading: Group and organize layout panels
steps.body: Group related visual elements together so the landing page stays organized and easy to maintain.

steps.heading: Hide supplementary tabs
steps.body: Hide any extra content tabs that aren't meant to be part of the main navigation, keeping the published view clean for viewers.

faq.question: Do I need design skills to build a Power BI landing page?
faq.answer: Basic familiarity with canvas formatting and button actions is enough; you don't need graphic design experience to build a functional landing page.

faq.question: Can I hide the page tabs from viewers?
faq.answer: Yes, you can hide supplementary content tabs so only the intended navigation pages are visible in the published report.

faq.question: How do navigation buttons work in Power BI?
faq.answer: Buttons can be configured with page navigation actions so clicking them jumps the viewer to a specific report page.

faq.question: Is a landing page necessary for every dashboard?
faq.answer: It's most useful for larger, multi-page dashboards meant for a broad audience, rather than small single-page reports.
